license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.zjwf4pe
title: DNA isolation from Formalin-Fixed, Paraffin-Embedded (FFPE) material
author: Hendrik F HFvE Van Essen

steps_raw.instruction: Cut 3 µm (1x), 10 µm (2-3x, or more if needed depending on tumour area)
Mount all the section on slides with BSA 0.1%, and dry them o/n at 37°C (to a maximum of one week)
Place slides in xylene 00:07:00, 3 times
Hydrate by passing sequentially through 100%, 96%, 70% EtOH, and distilled-water
Wash with running tap water 00:05:00
Stain slides with eosin 00:02:00
Wash quickly in water
Dehydrate by passing sequentially through 70%, 96%, 100% EtOH, xylene
Remove slides from xylene and use DePex to mount a covering glass.
Let the 3 µm H&E slide be judged by the pathologist for dissection. Mark the tumor area and tumor percentage
Stain slides with haematoxylin 00:02:00 (if solution is not fresh staining time can be extended, max 4 min.)
Place slides in xylene 3 x 7 min. 00:07:00, 3 times
Hydrate by passing sequentially through 100%, 96%, 70% EtOH, and water
Stain slides with haematoxylin 1-2 min. 00:02:00 (if solution is not fresh staining time can be extended, max 3 min.)
Wash with running tap water 00:05:00
Place slides in distilled water
Dissect the tissue from the slides (when they are still slightly wet) with a scalpel or a needle
Place the material in a clean safelock eppendorf cup
Spin down in a centrifuge at full speed and get rid of the water layer 00:05:00
Shake and invert samples (do not vortex).
Add 160 µl ATL buffer Buffer ATL Qiagen Catalog #19076
Add 40 µl prot K (20 mg/mL) Proteinase K Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #EO0491
vortex sample 00:00:15 Make sure all tissue is in the liquid
Incubate o/n at 56°C in heat-block or waterbath and vortex regularly! 08:00:00 56 °C Check if all tissue is digested
Vortex samples and spin down
Incubate at 98°C 10 min. 98 °C 00:10:00
Spin down at 16600 rcf.1 min. 00:01:00
Add 200 µl AL buffer and mixvery well by vortexing! Buffer AL, Lysis buffer Qiagen Catalog #19076
Add 200 µl Ethanol 100% and mix very well by vortexing! EtOH Contributed by users
Incubate at RT 00:05:00
Spin down the eppendorf cups at full speed1 min.
Transfer up to 600 µl lysate to the QIAamp MinElute Column.
Spin down at 8.000 rpm 00:01:00
Place the QIA Column in a clean 2 ml collection tube, discard the flow-through make sure the column tip is clear of droplets
Add 500 µl AW1 buffer to the column Buffer AW1 Qiagen Catalog #19081
Spin down for at 8.000 rpm and place the column in a new tube 00:01:00
Add 500 µl AW2 buffer (QIAmp micro-kit) to the column Buffer AW2 Qiagen Catalog #19072
Spin down at 8.000 rpm and place the column in a new tube 00:01:00
Spin down at full speed to dry the membrane 00:03:00
Place the QI column in a properly marked eppendorf cup, discard collection tube
Add 20 to 50 µl (depending on sample size) of AE buffer to the column and incubate. 00:05:00 20 °C, room temperature Buffer AE Qiagen Catalog #19077
Spin down at full speed. 00:03:00
Throw away the column, close the eppendorf cup and store the DNA at 4 °C
